_doc: JITTER CONTROL: byte-identical to wave2/w2-ctx-header (same collection), run as a second arm in the same benchmark. Its delta vs w2-ctx-header is the pure query-time noise floor (Qdrant server-side RRF tie-order jitter, ~30% of positions below rank ~10 on repeat calls) — the bar any same-collection query-time technique must clear.
